overall.description: First-person walking through a rain-slicked cyberpunk city at night. The character crosses a neon-lit intersection and proceeds along a sidewalk beneath towering corporate skyscrapers with bright holographic advertisements, eventually passing under an elevated highway structure. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) featuring ray-traced reflections and atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: turns left from crosswalk onto sidewalk alongside tall buildings
slows slightly while navigating the corner onto the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide wet intersection and turning left onto the sidewalk, avoiding passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: sedan with bright headlights driving through the intersection

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing on wet asphalt
rain-slicked road surface reflecting neon lights and car headlights
tall dark building with grid-patterned illuminated windows
modern building facade with horizontal yellow neon strip lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a low-angle view of a yellow crosswalk on wet asphalt at night. The camera moves forward across the intersection, turns left onto the sidewalk, and begins walking alongside towering futuristic buildings while cars pass through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk beneath corporate skyscrapers with neon signage

events.description: camera tilts upward briefly to reveal towering skyscrapers with large neon advertisements
continues walking straight at steady pace along the tactile paving strip

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, occasionally glancing up at the towering neon-lit architecture

entered.detail: tall building with large vertical red neon 'softsys' and 'SOFT' signage
yellow textured guidance strip running along the sidewalk edge
tall pole with horizontal LED light bar illuminating the walkway
large concrete structure with orange accent lighting spanning the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open sidewalk with the distinctive red-lit softsys building on the left and a glass residential tower on the right. The wet concrete reflects the neon lights overhead as the camera approaches the elevated highway structure in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk approaching elevated highway overpass with support columns

events.description: approaching the dark overpass structure, sky becomes obscured by concrete overhead
ambient light decreases significantly as entering the shadow of the overpass

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk toward the overpass, passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive structural pillar supporting the elevated highway above
short black and yellow posts separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk continues toward the looming overpass structure. The softsys building falls behind as massive concrete support columns appear on the left. A pedestrian approaches from the opposite direction while the ambient lighting grows darker under the shadow of the elevated highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway with fluorescent lighting

events.description: fully under the overpass, illuminated by overhead fluorescent tube lights
slight lateral movement to navigate around concrete support pillars

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered underpass area, navigating between structural columns while cars pass on the street to the right

notable_agents.action: person standing near the curb looking at the street traffic

entered.detail: underside of the elevated highway with exposed concrete and utility fixtures
long rectangular overhead lights illuminating the covered walkway
glowing cyan and red advertisements visible through the far end of the underpass

segments.scene_description: Now fully beneath the elevated highway, the scene is enclosed and darker, lit by fluorescent tubes overhead. The camera weaves between massive concrete support columns while the sound of traffic echoes above. Distant neon lights glow at the far end of the underpass, and occasional pedestrians appear near the street curb.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, neon-lit city intersection into the oppressive shadow of a massive concrete overpass. It begins with a low-angle view of a yellow crosswalk on wet asphalt, moving forward across the intersection before turning left onto a sidewalk flanked by towering futuristic buildings. As the camera proceeds, the environment shifts to a corridor between a red-lit corporate building and a glass residential tower, where the rain-slicked concrete reflects the overhead glow. The scene then transitions toward a looming highway structure, with the bright city lights fading as massive concrete support columns emerge and the ambient lighting grows darker. Finally, the camera moves fully beneath the elevated highway into an enclosed space lit by fluorescent tubes, weaving between heavy pillars while distant neon glows at the far end of the underpass.
